summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MyBase iteration 6 bug fixes and improvements. Backend 12/12 tests passed (100%) after fixing wishlist collection_id bug. Frontend UI tests all passed including click-to-open dialogs, delete via dropdown, tag filters, and cross-type linking.

bugs_fixed.issue: collection_id field was NOT being saved in the document - missing from the doc dictionary
bugs_fixed.fix_applied: Added collection_id: data.collection_id to the doc in create_wishlist_item function (line 636)

issues: Recharts warning: chart width/height -1 on initial load. Non-blocking, charts render correctly after component mounts.

passed_tests: Test 1: Auth - Login test2@test.com / test123
Test 2: Inventory - Click on 'Rolex Submariner' card opens edit dialog with pre-filled details
Test 3: Inventory - Delete via dropdown menu works (stopPropagation fix verified)
Test 4: Inventory - Tag filter dropdown shows 'Tous les tags' and existing tags
Test 5: Wishlist - Create with collection_id works (after backend fix)
Test 6: Wishlist - Click on 'Omega Speedmaster' card opens edit dialog
Test 7: Wishlist - Delete via dropdown works
Test 8: Collections - Click on card shows detail view with inventory + wishlist items
Test 9: Collections - Delete via dropdown works
Test 10: Collections - No 'Types' button (custom types removed)
Test 11: Content - Create with custom type via 'Ou créer un nouveau type...' input
Test 12: Content - Click on card opens edit dialog
Test 13: Content - Delete via dropdown works
Test 14: Projects - Click on card opens edit dialog
Test 15: Projects - Tag filter dropdown available
Test 16: Tags page - Auto-discovers tags from items with usage count and sources (luxe:2, montre:2)
Test 17: Tags page - Filter by source (Inventaire, Souhaits) works
Test 18: API - GET /api/tags/all returns tags with counts and sources
Test 19: API - GET /api/collections/{id}/items returns inventory + wishlist items
Test 20: ItemLinksManager - Present in all edit dialogs for cross-type linking
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during testing and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features are now working. Key bug fixed: wishlist collection_id was not being saved in create_wishlist_item endpoint. Cross-type linking via ItemLinksManager is working (Rolex Submariner ↔ Omega Speedmaster). Tags auto-discovery shows 'luxe' and 'montre' tags from both inventory and wishlist. Delete operations all work correctly with stopPropagation fix. Collection detail view shows both inventory and wishlist items. Custom content types are supported via free text input.

wishlist_collection_id.issue: POST /api/wishlist was not saving collection_id field
wishlist_collection_id.root_cause: collection_id was missing from the doc dictionary in create_wishlist_item function
wishlist_collection_id.fix: Added 'collection_id': data.collection_id to the doc dictionary on line 636 of server.py
wishlist_collection_id.verified: Backend tests pass, API now correctly saves and returns collection_id

click_to_open_dialogs.inventory: ✓ Card click opens edit dialog with pre-filled data
click_to_open_dialogs.wishlist: ✓ Card click opens edit dialog with pre-filled data
click_to_open_dialogs.collections: ✓ Card click opens detail view (not dialog)

delete_via_dropdown.all_pages: ✓ e.stopPropagation() fix working - delete from dropdown menu without triggering card click

tags_auto_discovery.api: GET /api/tags/all returns tags with count and sources
tags_auto_discovery.ui: TagsPage shows tags with usage count and source badges

custom_content_types.ui: Free text input 'Ou créer un nouveau type...' allows custom types

cross_type_linking.component: ItemLinksManager appears in all edit dialogs
cross_type_linking.functionality: Search and link items across types (inventory↔wishlist, project↔task, etc.)
